decision.next_action: use this priority map before any future package generator: candidates must name the same-lane card they challenge and prove the tradeoff in equal gate traces
decision.reason: Current 607 has protected anchors across topdeck access, turn-cycle miracle mana, payoff conversion, interaction, staples, and mana foundation. Current reports do not surface a direct replacement candidate; watch items are role/tag interpretation work, not evidence that a card should be cut.

external_learning.learning: Commander deckbuilding starts with role categories and win plans, but the final list still has to play the intended commander plan.
external_learning.source: EDHREC How to Build a Commander Deck

external_learning.learning: Synergy is commander-relative inclusion above the color baseline; it is useful evidence, but not automatic replacement proof.
Best-in-slot is deck-dependent. A staple can lose to a less famous card when the less famous card advances the deck plan better.
Lorehold's value comes from topdeck setup, discard-as-resource, miracle timing, and turning preparation into a high-impact spell turn.
Library of Leng, Scroll Rack, Sensei's Divining Top, and Land Tax are central topdeck/miracle engines, not generic draw slots.
